hero.headline:
Don't track
your cycle.
Understand it.
hero.subheading: Pepapp doesn't just track your cycle. It gets to know you over time, senses your changes, and gives you what you need exactly when you need it.

features.heading: Look beyond the cycle
features.subheading: Pepapp takes a holistic approach to your health. Not just a calendar — a real companion.

cycle.title: Smart Cycle Tracking
cycle.description: Predicts your cycle, sends reminders, and gets to know you better over time. More accurate, more personal every month.

pepTalk.title: PepTalk AI
pepTalk.description: A companion that truly listens. Answers your questions, understands how you feel, and offers personalized insights.

symptoms.title: Symptoms & Mood
symptoms.description: Track pain, fatigue, mood — all of it. Over time, you'll see clearly how you feel in each phase.

insights.title: Personal Predictions
insights.description: Your data is yours. So are your predictions. Cycle-specific insights that are genuinely personal, not generic.

wellness.title: Energy & Sleep
wellness.description: Holistic health tracking. Discover the connection between your energy, sleep patterns, and cycle.

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.description: Data is encrypted, yours alone. Never sold, never shared. Your health data is entirely in your control.

pepTalk.heading:
A companion that
truly listens.
pepTalk.subheading: Not a search engine. Not a symptom checker. PepTalk knows your cycle, understands how you feel, and is there exactly when you need it.

points.personal: Responses that personalize to your cycle

chatExample.userMessage: I'm so tired today and I can't figure out why.
chatExample.aiMessage: You're on day 21 of your cycle and energy dips are very normal at this stage. Your body is adjusting to progesterone shifts. A light walk and magnesium-rich foods may help.

screenshots.heading: Every moment, everywhere
screenshots.subheading: From design to content, every detail was considered to make you feel at ease.

what.question: What is Pepapp?
what.answer: Pepapp is a health companion that goes beyond cycle tracking. It gets to know you over time, understanding your cycle to deliver the insights and support you need exactly when you need them.

ai.question: How does PepTalk AI work?
ai.answer: PepTalk works in tandem with your cycle data. It doesn't just answer questions — it understands how you're feeling and offers personalized suggestions based on where you are in your cycle.

privacy.question: Is my data safe?
privacy.answer: Yes. All your health data is encrypted and fully in your control. We never share your data with third parties. We believe privacy is your most fundamental right.

free.question: Is Pepapp free?
free.answer: Pepapp's core features are completely free. Premium features are available via subscription. You can explore premium features with a free trial before committing.

platforms.question: Which devices can I use it on?
platforms.answer: Pepapp is available on iOS and Android. Your data syncs automatically across all your devices.

irregular.question: Does Pepapp work if I have an irregular cycle?
irregular.answer: Absolutely. Pepapp is designed for irregular cycles too. Over time, it analyzes your data to learn your pattern and personalizes its predictions and recommendations accordingly.

finalCta.heading: Start understanding your cycle.
finalCta.subheading: Join 700,000+ people who trust Pepapp to not just track their cycle — but truly understand it.
finalCta.disclaimer: Free to download. Premium features require subscription.
